title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers to automate daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. It supports complex workflow automation and is available only in Claude Pro and Max plans. The tutorial covers installation, configuration, and real-world use cases including file organization and calendar integration.
